title: I OM DIAM TUA LAI AH?

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A minthang mahmah innpi nuam khat om hi,
Van sang dawn pek pek ah;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tatsate Jesuh tawh teen na ding mun hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Puakpaak silh in kham kong zing zui ding uh hi,
Pasian’ itna khuavak ah pai ding uh hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Eite hong it Jesuh i muh ciang in-ah,
Pelh lo i zui ding hi;
Ei zong i om ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung nuntak na i nusiat ciangin,
A kiang i tung ding hi.
